attributes.action: Petition Against the Expansion of Mandatory Digital ID Systems
attributes.additional_details:
We believe:

* Every person has the right to privacy and bodily autonomy.
* Access to banking, healthcare, travel, employment, and public life should never depend solely on digital identity verification.
* Citizens must retain the option to use physical documents and offline alternatives.
* Personal data should not be concentrated into centralised systems vulnerable to misuse, hacking, profiling, or mission creep.
attributes.background: Protect Privacy, Freedom, and Human Dignity

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition which calls for a similar action: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/745717
